notes:
Never ran on Steam, but it used to run amazingly with no issues on Heroic Games Launcher. I absolutely love the game. The latest updates either added support for Linux or some say it was a "bug" but either way the latest update now has the game borked again, and it won't get past the loading screen without it complaining about EAC. Whatever they "fixed" or "updated" basically kicked off a bunch of new players they were gaining which used Linux.

If it's a bug people rely on, it's not a bug, it's a feature.

notes:
Since the latest patch the game is completely broken on linux. When starting the game you just get an EAC warning with error code 4. This is the full EAC report:

EAC has detected that game files have been modified (error code 4). To resolve this, please verify the integrity of the game cache (found under the Local Files section of the games properties). 
Additional info: Unknown file version (DeadByDaylight/Plugins/Runtime/Bhvr/ OnlineSubsystemEpic/ThirdParty/EOS/SDK/Bin/EOSSDK-Win64-Shipping.dll) 

Verifying and Repairing the game files doesn't do anything, even reinstalling the game and reinitializing the prefix didn't fix it. Completely borked since last patch.
title: Dead by Daylight
